summary: PR #74126 is a maintainer live-test smoke PR with zero changed files and an explicit do-not-merge instruction. The only ClawSweeper finding asks to keep it open for the maintainer to finish the live check and then close manually, so there is no narrow code repair or credited replacement PR to build.

actions.reason: Human maintainer action is required to complete or manually close the live-test PR; automation has no auditable code repair to apply.

needs_human: #74126: maintainer must finish the Clownfish/ClawSweeper live automerge adoption check and close the empty smoke PR manually without merge, or provide a separate source-change task if the live test exposed a real bug.
